parameters.content:
## AG_00 — Entrypoint Supervisor
**Classifier model:** claude-sonnet-4-6 | **Max tokens:** 512
**API:** HTTP → api.anthropic.com/v1/messages

### Credential Required
- Create a **Header Auth** credential named **ANTHROPIC_HTTP_HEADER_AUTH**
  - Header name: `x-api-key`
  - Header value: your Anthropic API key

### Webhooks
- POST /ag/supervisor/entry
- POST /ag/supervisor/clarification-reply
- POST /ag/supervisor/approval

## REQUIRED: Update Workflow IDs After Import

After importing ALL workflows, update the Execute Workflow node parameters:

1. Open each Execute Workflow node
2. Replace the placeholder value with the actual workflow ID
   (found in the URL when you open each workflow: /workflow/XXXXXXX)

**Workflows to link:**
- AG_01_PRODUCT_DISCOVERY
- AG_02_SOLUTION_ARCHITECT
- AG_03_TECH_LEAD
- AG_04_UX_UI_PLANNER
- AG_05_DELIVERY_PLANNER
- AG_06_FRONTEND_ENGINEER
- AG_07_BACKEND_ENGINEER
- AG_08_QA_REVIEWER
- AG_09_DEV_INTELLIGENCE
- AG_10_RESPONSE_FORMATTER
